tasks.name: Platform refresh
tasks.description: Upgrade the delivery platform in phases while keeping the roadmap readable at different nesting levels.

children.name: Architecture
children.description: Shape the technical plan, define boundaries, and prepare the implementation tracks.

children.name: Requirements
children.description: Collect stakeholder needs and turn them into a ranked backlog.

children.name: System design
children.description: Create the target architecture, key interfaces, and rollout constraints.

children.name: Implementation
children.description: Build the new services and user-facing workflows against the approved design.

children.name: Backend services
children.description: Deliver shared APIs, orchestration logic, and deployment automation.

children.name: Frontend UI
children.description: Ship the revised screens, interaction polish, and accessibility fixes.

children.name: Cutover
children.description: Complete the switchover checklist and move production traffic to the new stack.

tasks.name: Adoption
tasks.description: Help teams absorb the platform changes through training and a measured pilot.

children.name: Training
children.description: Prepare enablement material and run hands-on sessions for key users.

children.name: Pilot
children.description: Validate the rollout with a smaller cohort before broad adoption.
